title: Fish Szechuan Sauce
ingredients: 500g white fish fillets (cod, seabass, or tilapia)
steps: Pat fish dry and season with salt, pepper, and Shaoxing wine.
Coat fish with cornstarch.
Pan-fry until golden and crisp, then set aside.
Heat oil and fry chilies and Szechuan peppercorns.
Add garlic, ginger, and Doubanjiang and stir-fry.
Add stock, soy sauce, vinegar, sugar, and scallions.
Simmer sauce until slightly thick.
Pour sauce over fish and serve hot.

title: Sichuan Chicken Chili
steps: Marinate chicken with wine, soy sauce, egg white, and cornstarch.
Fry chicken until golden and crispy.
Stir-fry chilies and peppercorns until fragrant.
Add garlic, ginger, and scallions.
Return chicken and toss on high heat.
Serve hot with rice.

title: Chili Oil
steps: Heat oil with garlic, ginger, and spices slowly.
Infuse for 10–15 minutes.
Mix chili flakes with salt and sugar.
Pour hot oil over chili mixture.
Cool and store in jar.

title: Hot Garlic Sauce
steps: Sauté garlic and chilies in oil.
Add soy sauce, vinegar, and stock.
Simmer mixture.
Add slurry to thicken.
Finish with sesame oil.
